strategy: Stop delivery intake, drain or expire live scheduler and delivery leases, retain quarantine and receipt evidence, and require an empty publication journal and absence of delivery authorization evidence before reversing migrations 006, 005, and 004. Then deploy the authoritative Sprint 04 commit. Once publication or authorization history exists, downgrade is refused and forward repair is mandatory.

tests.name: Sprint 04 binary against downgraded schema
tests.summary: The drill reversed migrations 006-004, started the authoritative Sprint 04 binary against migration 003, verified operation, and reapplied the current schema.

tests.name: unsafe history downgrade refusal
coverage: prepared, published, abandoned, or conflicted publication journals
legacy blocked-run resume histories incompatible with the Sprint 04 verifier

tests.name: quarantine and receipt preservation
tests.summary: Rollback never deletes unverified work, resets an operator branch, or removes receipts to manufacture compatibility.

runtime_state_impact: Migration downgrade is safe only before Sprint 05 authority or publication history becomes operational. Otherwise the canonical data is retained and the runtime remains on the Sprint 05 schema for forward repair.
